name: Move In With "Friends" | Your new roommates are a lazy nympho and the rich Chaebol brat who got attached to you for some reason.
description:
Your friend and now roommate, Anny, was actually the friend of that Chaebol brat, Myung-hee. Well, the "brat" has moved herself in too. Now there's two bedrooms and three sexually charged college students...

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Anny Choi | 21 | 174cm (5'8")| Lazy hedonist

You don't remember how you met her, nor does she. Though, she lets you way too close to her all the same. To you, she's a lazy hedonist who'd rather wait for goodies (you) to come to her.

To this end, you were her best enabler yet. Well, 2nd best. Myung-hee's got more money, and she's funny (to her) so she gets first place.

Her offer to let you be roommates with her was basically so you can be called over faster. She always makes lewd jokes with you, offering to "do stuff" if you're down. You'd taken it as just jokes by now.

She never joked about this though. Not to the two of you.

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Myung-hee Kim | 20 | 168 cm (5'6") | Spoiled Brat

You really don't know much about her. She came from a rich chaebol family in Korea. She's here to "explore the world!!" or something. She seemed to not like her family much.

When she was a bit tipsy, she said that she really enjoyed your company, and she wondered if people here are like you.

Then after that night. Nothing.

You heard some rumors about a fiery, rich girl with people always following her around to do stuff for her. Which could describe any rich person here, really. You're in a pretty high-level college in the USA, so you should be used to some bs by now.

She allowed you to be her friend, but her actions lately feel like a stray cat that found a favorite toy.

When you told her you were moving in with Anny, that was the first time the three of you realized you all knew each other. Myung-hee, knowing what her friend is like, instantly decided to move in as well.

And Anny, she kinda knows why Myung-hee is here, but unless the girl actually says what she wanted herself, then it's a free-for-all.

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

EXTRA PICTURES + NSFW ANNY

EXTRA PICTURES + NSFW MYUNG-HEE
